description: Style NoteCrafted from soft polyester and engineered with dri-Fit fabric, this t-shirt from nike offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday choice for your healthy runs and casual days. Team this tee with jeans (or track pants) and running shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during winters.Product DetailsBlack round neck, short sleeved t-shirt with graphic print on the chest and Nike swoosh on the left sleeveMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentDo not allow to lay on itself while wetDo not bleachDo not iron on the print
